tags.title: Tags
newspapers.title: Newspapers
newspapers.requestReason: Why do you want to create a newspaper?
newspapers.archivedOwnerNote: This newspaper is archived. You can no longer publish articles. Contact an admin to lift the archive.
newspapers.archivedAdminNote: This newspaper is archived. Publishing is locked until you lift the archive.
newspapers.adminHiddenNotice: Admin view: this newspaper is hidden or archived and is not visible to other players.
newspapers.confirmArchiveBody: Archiving stops all future publishing. Only a super-admin can lift the archive afterwards.
newspapers.confirmDeleteArticleBody: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
newspapers.noSubscriptions: You haven't subscribed to any newspapers yet.
events.title: Events
events.name: Name
events.confirmHideBody: “{name}” will be hidden from the events list. An admin can restore it.
events.confirmDeleteBody: “{name}” will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
admin.title: Admin
profile.title: My Profile
profile.changePending: Pending: change to “{name}” awaiting admin approval.
profile.changeWarningSupport: Username changes require admin approval. You cannot change it yourself.
onboarding.title: Set your Minecraft username
onboarding.intro: Before you continue, tell us your in-game Minecraft username so other players can find you.
onboarding.warnCaseSensitive: This is case sensitive — type it exactly as it appears in-game.
onboarding.warnSupport: You won't be able to change this yourself afterwards — you'll have to contact support (an admin).
notFound.message: This page doesn't exist, or has been hidden or removed.
error.forbidden: You don't have permission to do this.
error.rateLimited: You're doing that too fast. Please slow down.
error.newspaper.archived: This newspaper is archived; publishing is locked.
error.changeRequestPending: You already have a pending change request.
error.onboardingRequired: Set your Minecraft username before doing this.
